name: learn-coursera
description: Meta-skill for turning Coursera courses into Claude Code skills. Discovers top professional courses on any topic, extracts video transcripts via Playwright, enriches them into actionable notes, scores skill-worthiness with a 5-criteria rubric, then builds + benchmarks new skills and packages them as plugins. Handles single courses and Professional Certificates. Triggers on English and Vietnamese prompts about finding courses, extracting transcripts, or learning a new skill from Coursera.
